title: The Unfortunate Reality of Modern Day Scientists
summary: A brief discussion about the criticism of scientists who dismiss unconventional ideas, using Enrico Fermi's interest in extraterrestrial life as an example of how even respected scientists historically contemplated such topics.

key_claims.claim: Enrico Fermi created the theoretical underpinning for splitting the atom
Enrico Fermi was thinking about aliens in his off time at Los Alamos
Scientists who debase people interested in new ideas are acting heretically
